challenge.title: Korak 3
challenge.description:
Imajte na umu da se HTML koji unesete u editor prikazuje u prozoru za pregled. U ovoj radionici ćete deo po deo praviti HTML za stranicu nastavnog plana.

Ispod vašeg elementa h1, napišite sledeće na prazan red:

Full-Stack Curriculum

tests.text: Trebalo bi ti da imaš tekst Full-Stack Curriculum u svom editoru. Pažljivo proveri pravopis.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Welcome to freeCodeCamp

Full-Stack Curriculum

Learn the skills to become a full-stack developer

Introduction to HTML

HTML represents the content and structure of a webpage

Introduction to CSS

CSS is used to style a webpage

Introduction to JavaScript

JavaScript adds interactivity to a webpage
